data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The prior steps do not demonstrate any direct validation of ownership checks between subscribers and endpoints, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence or validations, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
evidencePointers: No evidence of subscriber-to-endpoint ownership checks in prior steps.
